final:
module shift_register (
    input clk,
    input reset,
    input enable,
    input in_bit,
    output reg [3:0] out
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
        out <= 4'b0000;
    end else if (enable) begin
        out <= {out[2:0], in_bit};
    end
end

endmodule
